raw_consumer_statement:
Two complaints against CITI. 

XXXX. Purchased a new ebike and accessories from XXXX XXXX XXXX, the accessories are not made for the bike and requested a refund of XXXX fo the accessories, merchant refused returns or resolution. Disputed the charge with CITI bank and they determined customer was responsible. 

XXXX. XXXX XXXX damaged wiring on our car while troubleshooting. Contacted XXXX XXXX several times and did not receive a response. Disputed the charge of XXXX and CITI again determined customer responsible. 

Clearly CITI does not support their customers, additionally we have documentation and pictures supporting both disputes.
